## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] Ran RepoLens locally if generated documentation behavior changed

## Scope Checks

- [ ] Keeps default behavior local-first
- [ ] Does not add external API calls by default
- [ ] Updates docs or tests where behavior changed
